packageRules.description: Hold the typescript major (v7, the native compiler port): our toolchain peers exclude it — ts-jest@29 pins typescript '>=4.3 <7' and typescript-eslint@8 pins '>=4.8.4 <6.1.0'. Remove this rule (and bump all three together) once ts-jest and typescript-eslint ship TS 7-compatible releases. Kept here (consumer-owned, upgrade-durable) rather than in the managed renovate-default.json. Refs #101.
